creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
$ cat a.c
#include <sys/resource.h>

int main()
{
  struct rlimit limit;
  limit.rlim_cur = limit.rlim_max = 5000000;
  if (setrlimit (RLIMIT_VMEM, &limit) < 0)
    return 1;
  return 0;
}
$ cc a.c
$ G_SLICE=always-malloc ./a.out
$ ./a.out
